summary: Wire runtime-control execution, artifact policy, retention, tracing, and API integration.
rationale: The integration slice intentionally touches the existing runtime orchestrator adapter plus runtime-control package code so workflow execution can emit durable runtime-control events and enforce output/retention policy.
deletion_targets: runtime progress callbacks that are not projected into runtime-control events
artifact output modes that cannot be configured per local runtime policy
risks: WorkflowRuntime must remain the only runtime-control module allowed to import the concrete orchestrator adapter.
Trace and artifact policy changes must not expose provider payloads, cookies, auth headers, browser storage, or raw resume text outside the existing visibility policy.
Retention cleanup must not delete active runtime-control audit state.
